tasks.label: Start timing for t33
tasks.command: echo $(date +%s.%N) > /tmp/denoptim_test/t33/.test_start_time && echo 'Timing started for test t33'

tasks.label: Show timing for t33
tasks.command: if [ -f /tmp/denoptim_test/t33/.test_start_time ]; then start_time=$(cat /tmp/denoptim_test/t33/.test_start_time); end_time=$(date +%s.%N); duration=$(echo "scale=3; $end_time - $start_time" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo "calculation failed"); echo ''; echo '========================================'; echo "Test 't33' runtime: ${duration} seconds"; echo '========================================'; rm -f /tmp/denoptim_test/t33/.test_start_time; else echo 'Start time file not found'; fi
